0: A low-angle shot of a grand, historic stone building with classical architectural details, featuring arched windows, decorative cornices, and a central entrance with a small staircase and metal railings. The facade is composed of beige stone blocks, with some windows reflecting the overcast sky. Lush greenery and flowering bushes frame the base of the building, while modern structures are faintly visible in the background under a cloudy sky. The camera slowly pans upward, emphasizing the building’s imposing and timeless presence.
81: A low-angle shot of the San Mateo County History Museum, showcasing its grand stone facade with arched windows and intricate architectural details. The camera pans upward, revealing the building’s imposing entrance and ornate cornices against a partly cloudy sky. Lush greenery and flowering bushes frame the structure, while a white sign in the foreground reads “San Mateo County History Museum – Discover the Past, Imagine the Future.” The scene exudes historical charm and quiet dignity.
161: A low-angle shot of the San Mateo County History Museum, showcasing its grand, historic architecture with beige stone walls, arched windows, and ornate cornices. Ivy climbs the facade, adding texture, while a lush green bush with white blossoms and red flowers frames the foreground. The sky above is partly cloudy, casting soft natural light. The camera slowly pans right, revealing more of the building’s intricate details and the adjacent modern structure. A white sign with the museum’s name is partially visible at the base.
241: A low-angle shot of a grand, historic beige building with ornate architectural details and arched windows, partially covered in ivy. The camera pans slowly left, revealing a blooming white-flowered bush in the foreground and a sign that reads “SAN MATEO COUNTY HISTORY MUSEUM.” Behind, modern buildings and a palm tree contrast with the vintage structure under a partly cloudy sky. The scene exudes a calm, nostalgic urban atmosphere.
321: A low-angle shot of a historic beige building with ornate architectural details and arched windows, partially covered in ivy. In front, a blooming white-flowered tree stands beside a black bench, with lush greenery and a palm tree in the background. The camera pans smoothly from left to right, revealing a modern glass door with a notice, set against a cloudy sky. The scene exudes calmness, blending classic architecture with natural beauty.
401: A medium shot of the exterior of a beige, classical-style building with arched windows and decorative stonework. The camera slowly pans right, revealing a glass door entrance flanked by two black benches and a blooming white-flowered tree. A blue "NO SKATEBOARDING OR BICYCLING" sign stands near the sidewalk. The windows reflect cloudy skies and surrounding trees, giving the scene a quiet, overcast urban atmosphere.
481: A wide-angle shot of a grand, historic building with classical architectural details, including arched windows and ornate cornices. The camera pans upward, revealing its imposing facade against a partly cloudy sky. The building’s beige stone exterior contrasts with modern glass windows. In front, a sidewalk lined with benches and flowering bushes leads to the entrance. Nearby, a "No Skateboarding or Bicycling" sign is visible. The scene captures a quiet urban moment, blending historical charm with contemporary city life.
